etymology.interpretation: The character 𤣩 is a variant form of 玉(玉) (yù, "jade"), which originally depicted a cong, a type of ritual jade totem. Over time, a dot was added to distinguish it from 王(王) (wáng, "king") due to the visual similarity between the two characters. Jade played a significant role in art and rituals, which is why its pictogram was distinctly designed. The character represents the material jade and its cultural significance as a precious and spiritual object.
